inapplicable.description: Ensure every accesskey attribute value is unique
inapplicable.help: accesskey attribute value should be unique

inapplicable.description: Ensure <area> elements of image maps have alternative text
inapplicable.help: Active <area> elements must have alternative text

inapplicable.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
inapplicable.help: Elements must only use supported ARIA attributes

inapplicable.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
inapplicable.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

inapplicable.description: Ensure aria-braillelabel and aria-brailleroledescription have a non-braille equivalent
inapplicable.help: aria-braille attributes must have a non-braille equivalent

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA button, link and menuitem has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA commands must have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure ARIA attributes are used as described in the specification of the element's role
inapplicable.help: ARIA attributes must be used as specified for the element's role

inapplicable.description: Ensure elements do not use deprecated roles
inapplicable.help: Deprecated ARIA roles must not be used

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA dialog and alertdialog node has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA dialog and alertdialog nodes should have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
inapplicable.help: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA input fields must have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA meter node has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA meter nodes must have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA progressbar node has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA progressbar nodes must have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
inapplicable.help: Elements must only use permitted ARIA attributes

inapplicable.description: Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
inapplicable.help: Required ARIA attributes must be provided

inapplicable.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them
inapplicable.help: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

inapplicable.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are contained by them
inapplicable.help: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents

inapplicable.description: Ensure all elements with a role attribute use a valid value
inapplicable.help: ARIA roles used must conform to valid values

inapplicable.description: Ensure role="text" is used on elements with no focusable descendants
inapplicable.help: "role=text" should have no focusable descendants

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA toggle field has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA toggle fields must have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA tooltip node has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA tooltip nodes must have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure every ARIA treeitem node has an accessible name
inapplicable.help: ARIA treeitem nodes should have an accessible name

inapplicable.description: Ensure all ARIA attributes have valid values
inapplicable.help: ARIA attributes must conform to valid values

inapplicable.description: Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
inapplicable.help: ARIA attributes must conform to valid names

inapplicable.description: Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
inapplicable.help: autocomplete attribute must be used correctly

inapplicable.description: Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
inapplicable.help: Inline text spacing must be adjustable with custom stylesheets

inapplicable.description: Ensure <blink> elements are not used
inapplicable.help: <blink> elements are deprecated and must not be used

inapplicable.description: Ensure buttons have discernible text
inapplicable.help: Buttons must have discernible text

inapplicable.description: Ensure <dl> elements are structured correctly
inapplicable.help: <dl> elements must only directly contain properly-ordered <dt> and <dd> groups, <script>, <template> or <div> elements

inapplicable.help: <dt> and <dd> elements must be contained by a <dl>

inapplicable.help: Frames with focusable content must not have tabindex=-1

inapplicable.help: Frames should be tested with axe-core

inapplicable.help: Frames must have a unique title attribute

inapplicable.help: <object> elements must have alternative text

inapplicable.help: Scrollable region must have keyboard access
